author: gurukamath
content: Why does this say that we charge the cold access cost for 7702 delegations, even in cases where the address is in the access list?

author: draganrakita
content:
It is pain and not performant to touch access list  (access list is vec struct, while you would need hashmap) to figure out if any of caller, target or eip7702 delegate are present. Especially within txpool.

Access list is always going to cost more than ordinary cold load so using it is going to be discouraged.

Only people that made mistake would add items to access list. Purpose of access list was mitigate storage/account gas load increase, but with all gas changes that we do, its purpose is decreased.

So after taking all of above into account, it looks beter to simplify checks and make a cost be always a cold load.
